Package org.rodinp.core.tests

Class AttributeTests

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.tests.AbstractRodinDBTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.ModifyingResourceTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.AttributeTests
public class AttributeTests extends ModifyingResourceTests
Tests about attributes of Rodin internal elements.

    testGenericSetAttribute()
    Ensures that generic attribute values can be set (tested only for boolean).

    Ensures that the getAttributeTypes() and hasAttribute() methods works properly on Rodin files.

    Ensures that the getAttributeTypes() and hasAttribute() methods works properly on internal elements.

    Ensures that the removeAttribute() method works properly on Rodin files.
    void
    testRemoveAttributeInternal()
    Ensures that the removeAttribute() method works properly on internal elements.
    void
    testRemoveAttributeNoElementFile()
    Ensures that attempting to remove an attribute on an inexistent Rodin file raises an ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST error.
    void
    testRemoveAttributeNoElementInternal()
    Ensures that attempting to remove an attribute on an inexistent internal element raises an ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST error.
    void
    testSetAttributeNoElementInternal()
    Ensures that attempting to set an attribute on an inexistent internal element raises an ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST error.
    void
    testSetAttributeNoElementRoot()
    Ensures that attempting to set an attribute on an inexistent Rodin file raises an ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST error.
    void
    testSetInvalidAttributeInternal()
    Ensures that an attribute of invalid type for a given non-root element cannot be set.
    void
    testSetInvalidAttributeRoot()
    Ensures that an attribute of invalid type for a given root element cannot be set.
